findings.description: The knowledge file contains 'taqlibディレクティブ' (taqlib) which is a typo not present in the source. The source consistently uses 'taglibディレクティブ' throughout. This incorrect term was introduced during transformation.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'JSPでカスタムタグを使用する場合、taglibディレクティブを指定する。' / 'taglibを使用するJSPの先頭で、prefixを指定して宣言を行う。'

findings.description: Missing PascalCase class names that appear in the code examples: ValidationContext (used in both Map型 and List型 examples), ApplicationException (thrown on validation failure in both receiving Action examples). These are API types relevant to implementation questions about data passing.
